chapters.title: Into the Goblin Forest
lines: Your master's last words still echo in your ears.
The Tower of Numbers has fallen.
Goblins march from the forest. They carry stolen wisdom.
You are the last apprentice. The math is yours to wield.
Cast true. Cast well. Save the tower.
And so you step into the trees...

victories: Carry the one — carry the day!
taunts: Your books won't help you here!
